summary: Live PR inventory shard only; no shared canonical was identified or invented. All 10 seeded PRs are open, non-security, and not safe for closeout under this job because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled. PRs with maintainer-review/product/technical-correctness gates are scoped to item-level needs_human; the remaining draft or proof-blocked PRs are kept open as independent inventory items.

actions.reason: Maintainer/product and technical-correctness judgment is required for a green, message-delivery gateway feature PR; this inventory job cannot merge or fix it.
Keep open as an independent PR; proof remains unresolved and this job cannot merge, fix, or close it.
Keep open as independent draft work; not closable as low-signal and not mergeable or repairable in this no-fix inventory job.
Human or follow-up repair is required because actionable bot findings and a maintainer rebase signal remain, and this job cannot fix or merge the branch.

Small focused prompt wording change needs maintainer judgment; linked issue state is unavailable and this job cannot merge or fix.
Keep open as an independent proof-blocked focused PR; not enough live linked-issue context for closure or fixed-by-candidate routing.
Keep open as an independent proof-blocked PR; no low-signal policy is enabled and technical correctness cannot be decided in this close/comment/label-only job.
Explicit maintainer-review signal blocks automated closure or merge; keep the PR for maintainer decision.
